content:
# elizaos/eliza Daily Update (Apr 26, 2026)

## OVERVIEW 
Development on April 26 focused on enhancing the Automations and LifeOps layers, improving native desktop application support, and refining trigger-event handling. Key updates include a new multi-stage workflow progress UI, improved routing for trigger tasks, and significant cleanup of chat and automation state management.

## KEY TECHNICAL DEVELOPMENTS

*   **Automations & Workflow Enhancements**
    *   Introduced a 6-stage progress card in `WorkflowGraphViewer` for better user feedback during generation ([#7127](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7127)).
    *   Improved action-planner disambiguation and added logic to delete associated chat rooms when workflows are removed ([#7120](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7120), [#7121](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7121)).
    *   Fixed UI bugs including stale-id draft selection and redundant chat docks on empty states ([#7128](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7128), [#7125](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7125)).
    *   Resolved credential-resolution issues for n8n workflow generation ([#7118](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7118)).

*   **Trigger & Event System Improvements**
    *   Implemented `TriggerEventBridge` to connect runtime events to the trigger-handler pipeline ([#7116](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7116)).
    *   Enabled Telegram `MESSAGE_RECEIVED` events to fire triggers correctly ([#7122](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7122)).
    *   Fixed routing and scope-rejection bugs for `CREATE_TRIGGER_TASK` and `LIFE` actions ([#7124](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7124), [#7123](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7123), [#7119](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7119)).

*   **Native App & Infrastructure**
    *   Integrated native window support for apps and the App Details page ([#7115](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7115)).
    *   Increased streaming chat generation timeout to 180s to accommodate complex LLM workloads ([#7117](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7117)).
    *   Performed various dependency updates across Rust, Python, and Node.js environments ([#7131](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7131), [#7130](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7130), [#7103](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7103), etc.).

## NEWLY OPENED PULL REQUESTS
*   [#7133](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7133): Fixes for WidgetHost re-export cycles and steward static node imports.
*   [#7132](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7132): Fixes for LifeOps schedule persistence and splash asset paths.
*   [#7114](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7114): Implementation of apps opening in dedicated native windows.

## CLOSED ISSUES
*   *None reported.*

## NEW ISSUES
*   **Integration Tracking**
    *   [#7108](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/7108): Tracking issue for integrating 29 commits from the `shaw/checkpoint-20260426-eliza` branch into `develop`.

## ACTIVE ISSUES
*   *None.*
